items.title: Stop paying monthly for cloud storage with up to 70% off pCloud Lifetime this 4th of July
items.summary: For Apple users, storage never feels finished. iPhone photo libraries keep growing, Macs fill up with large projects and downloads, and the monthly services meant to solve the problem can become another subscription to track. pCloud's 4th...

items.title: Apple accelerates security updates in response to AI-powered hacking risks
items.summary: Today's iOS, iPadOS, and macOS 26.5.2 updates include security fixes that Apple had originally planned to release with version 26.6 of each operating system. Here's why the company pushed them out early.

items.title: Apple's $502M payment to Optis over patent infringement goes to UK Supreme Court
items.summary: Apple is contesting a ruling that would force it to pay Optis $502 million for LTE patent infringement, but the UK Supreme Court has yet to reach a verdict. Apple seeks to avoid paying Optis $502 million over alleged patent infringement....

items.title: How a gas plant helped fast-track 270 MW of new solar
items.summary: Getting new solar projects connected to the grid can take years. Earthrise Energy says it's found a faster way.

items.title: Open Source AI Agent OpenClaw Gets Native iOS App
items.summary: Popular open source AI agent OpenClaw is expanding to the iPhone and iPad with a new native iOS app. OpenClaw for iOS can be used alongside an existing gateway as a secure node for chat, voice approvals, sharing, and device-aware...

items.title: Apple asks UK Supreme Court to overturn $502 million patent ruling in Optis dispute
items.summary: Apple's long-running patent dispute with Optis is set to enter a new chapter this week, as the case reaches the UK Supreme Court. Here are the details.

items.title: When Software Outruns Silicon: Hardware-Assisted Test Generation to the Rescue
items.summary: For the past decade, the semiconductor industry has been moving in one direction: shift-left, specifically, shifting more validation into the pre-silicon phase. The idea was straightforward: if software ultimately determines how a system...

items.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
items.summary: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

items.title: CUDA emulator for AMD GPUs Zluda loses funding with v6 release - embattled project goes back to hobby status but now includes 32-bit PhysX support
items.summary: Zluda is back to a hobby, as the open-source project has lost commercial funding with version 6 but added early 32-bit PhysX support.

items.title: This highly rated Ultimate Ears Bluetooth speaker just dropped to a record low of $49.99
items.summary: The 4.6-star Bluetooth speaker MINIROLL speaker is 38% off, packing big sound, a clip-on strap, and solid durability.
